ucs.title: [LLM] Equation Group (EQGRP / Tilded Team) GrayFish/EquationDrug disk-class lower-filter driver persistence
ucs.description: Hunts for installation of a malicious storage-class lower/upper filter driver registered under the Disk or Volume device class GUIDs — the canonical persistence vector used by Equation Group's GrayFish and EquationDrug implants to load before the OS file-system stack and host a hidden virtual filesystem in unallocated disk space (Kaspersky 2015 'Equation: Death Star of the Malware Galaxy'). This combination of T1542.002 (Component Firmware / pre-boot driver) plus T1564.005 (Hidden File System) is uniquely Equation tradecraft — only Equation, Sednit/Strider Remsec, and a tiny set of state-grade
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Registry.registry_value_data) as filter_value values(Registry.process_name) as writer_proc values(Registry.process_path) as writer_path values(Registry.process_guid) as writer_pgid count from datamodel=Endpoint.Registry where (Registry.registry_path="*\\Class\\{4D36E967-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}*" OR Registry.registry_path="*\\Class\\{71A27CDD-812A-11D0-BEC7-08002BE2092F}*") (Registry.registry_value_name="LowerFilters" OR Registry.registry_value_name="UpperFilters") by Registry.dest Registry.user Registry.registry_path Registry.registry_value_name
| `drop_dm_object_name(Registry)`
| search NOT writer_proc IN ("services.exe","msiexec.exe","TrustedInstaller.exe","drvinst.exe","setup.exe","poqexec.exe","wuauclt.exe")
| join type=outer dest [
    | tstats summariesonly=true values(Processes.process_name) as driver_writer values(Processes.parent_process_name) as driver_writer_parent count as drv_load_count from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_path="*\\system32\\drivers\\*" Filesystem.file_name="*.sys" Filesystem.action="created") by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.file_name Filesystem.file_hash
    | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)`
    | search NOT driver_writer IN ("services.exe","msiexec.exe","TrustedInstaller.exe","drvinst.exe","poqexec.exe")
  ]
| eval equation_ioc=if(match(filter_value,"(?i)(mstcp32|msndsrv|atmdkdrv|prkmtx|fvexpy|msrstd|nls_933w|romeos)"),"yes","no")
| `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
| table firstTime lastTime dest user registry_path registry_value_name filter_value writer_proc writer_path file_name file_hash equation_ioc
ucs.kql:
// Equation Group GrayFish/EquationDrug — disk-class filter driver persistence
let _equation_driver_iocs = dynamic(["mstcp32.sys","msndsrv.sys","atmdkdrv.sys","prkmtx.sys","prkmtx.dll","fvexpy.exe","msrstd.dll","nls_933w.dll","romeos.hlp"]);
let _legit_filter_writers = dynamic(["services.exe","msiexec.exe","trustedinstaller.exe","drvinst.exe","setup.exe","poqexec.exe","wuauclt.exe"]);
let _disk_class_guids = dynamic([@"\Class\{4D36E967-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}",   // Disk drives
                                  @"\Class\{71A27CDD-812A-11D0-BEC7-08002BE2092F}",   // Volume
                                  @"\Class\{4D36E97B-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}"]); // SCSIAdapter
let RegImplant =
    DeviceRegistryEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where ActionType in ("RegistryValueSet","RegistryKeyCreated")
    | where RegistryKey has_any (_disk_class_guids)
    | where RegistryValueName in~ ("LowerFilters","UpperFilters")
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (_legit_filter_writers)
    | project RegTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName,
              RegistryKey, RegistryValueName, RegistryValueData,
              RegWriter = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              RegWriterCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              RegWriterAcct = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
              RegWriterSHA = InitiatingProcessSHA256;
let SusDriverLoads =
    DeviceImageLoadEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where FileName endswith ".sys"
    | where FolderPath has @"\system32\drivers\"
    | where FileName in~ (_equation_driver_iocs)
       or InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("services.exe","system")
    | project DriverLoadTime = Timestamp, DeviceId,
              DriverFile = FileName, DriverPath = FolderPath,
              DriverSHA256 = SHA256, DriverLoader = InitiatingProcessFileName;
RegImplant
| join kind=leftouter SusDriverLoads on DeviceId
| extend EquationIOC = iff(
      RegistryValueData has_any (_equation_driver_iocs)
   or DriverFile in~ (_equation_driver_iocs), "yes", "no")
| where EquationIOC == "yes"
   or DriverFile != ""               // any non-Microsoft .sys load adjacent to filter-write
   or RegWriter !in~ (_legit_filter_writers)
| project RegTime, DeviceName, RegWriterAcct,
          RegistryKey, RegistryValueName, RegistryValueData,
          RegWriter, RegWriterCmd, RegWriterSHA,
          DriverLoadTime, DriverFile, DriverPath, DriverSHA256, DriverLoader,
          EquationIOC
| order by RegTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Equation Group GrayFish/EquationDrug — disk-class filter driver persistence (ASIM portable)
let _equation_driver_iocs = dynamic(["mstcp32.sys","msndsrv.sys","atmdkdrv.sys","prkmtx.sys","prkmtx.dll","fvexpy.exe","msrstd.dll","nls_933w.dll","romeos.hlp"]);
let _legit_filter_writers = dynamic(["services.exe","msiexec.exe","trustedinstaller.exe","drvinst.exe","setup.exe","poqexec.exe","wuauclt.exe"]);
let _disk_class_guids = dynamic([@"\Class\{4D36E967-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}",
                                  @"\Class\{71A27CDD-812A-11D0-BEC7-08002BE2092F}",
                                  @"\Class\{4D36E97B-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}"]);
let RegImplant =
    ImRegistryEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
    | where EventType in ("RegistryValueSet","RegistryKeyCreated")
    | where RegistryKey has_any (_disk_class_guids)
    | where RegistryValue in~ ("LowerFilters","UpperFilters")
    | where ActingProcessName !in~ (_legit_filter_writers)
    | project RegTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
              RegistryKey, RegistryValue, RegistryValueData,
              RegWriter = ActingProcessName,
              RegWriterCmd = ActingProcessCommandLine;
let SusDriverWrites =
    ImFileEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
    | where EventType in ("FileCreated","FileModified")
    | where TargetFileName endswith ".sys"
    | where TargetFilePath has @"\system32\drivers\"
    | where TargetFileName in~ (_equation_driver_iocs)
       or ActingProcessName !in~ (_legit_filter_writers)
    | project DriverTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname,
              DriverFile = TargetFileName, DriverPath = TargetFilePath,
              DriverSHA256 = TargetFileSHA256, DriverWriter = ActingProcessName;
RegImplant
| join kind=leftouter SusDriverWrites on DvcHostname
| extend EquationIOC = iff(
      RegistryValueData has_any (_equation_driver_iocs)
   or DriverFile in~ (_equation_driver_iocs), "yes", "no")
| where EquationIOC == "yes" or DriverFile != "" or RegWriter !in~ (_legit_filter_writers)
| project RegTime, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
          RegistryKey, RegistryValue, RegistryValueData,
          RegWriter, RegWriterCmd,
          DriverTime, DriverFile, DriverPath, DriverSHA256, DriverWriter,
          EquationIOC
| order by RegTime desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Equation Group GrayFish/EquationDrug Disk-Class Filter Driver Persistence
id: 0b8e3e1e-6f9a-49a7-9c1d-84e2f5d7a13c
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects writes to LowerFilters / UpperFilters registry values under the
  Disk, Volume, or SCSIAdapter device class GUIDs — the persistence
  mechanism used by Equation Group's GrayFish and EquationDrug implants to
  load a malicious storage filter driver before the OS file-system stack,
  enabling a hidden virtual filesystem on disk slack space
  (T1542.002 + T1564.005). Optional enrichment matches against known
  Equation driver/payload filenames documented by Kaspersky (2015).
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0020/
  - https://securelist.com/equation-the-death-star-of-malware-galaxy/68750/
  - https://securelist.com/inside-the-equationdrug-espionage-platform/69203/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1542.002
  - attack.t1564.005
  - attack.t1547.006
  - attack.t1112
  - attack.g0020
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: registry_set
detection:
  selection_class:
    TargetObject|contains:
      - '\Class\{4D36E967-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}\'
      - '\Class\{71A27CDD-812A-11D0-BEC7-08002BE2092F}\'
      - '\Class\{4D36E97B-E325-11CE-BFC1-08002BE10318}\'
  selection_value:
    TargetObject|endswith:
      - '\LowerFilters'
      - '\UpperFilters'
  filter_legit_installers:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\services.exe'
      - '\msiexec.exe'
      - '\TrustedInstaller.exe'
      - '\drvinst.exe'
      - '\setup.exe'
      - '\poqexec.exe'
      - '\wuauclt.exe'
  condition: selection_class and selection_value and not filter_legit_installers
fields:
  - Image
  - User
  - TargetObject
  - Details
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate third-party storage filter driver installation (e.g. encryption, snapshot, AV vendors). Tune by allowlisting the installer Image once verified.
level: high
ucs.rationale: Equation Group is the only widely-tracked APT whose public toolkits (GrayFish, EquationDrug, DoubleFantasy) document a persistence chain that registers the implant as a kernel-mode disk filter driver under the Disk/Volume class GUID, then mounts a hidden virtual filesystem in NTFS slack — directly satisfying the actor's known T1542.002 + T1564.005 combination. Generic 'rare driver load' or 'Run ke
